parts.description:
Internal Base UI-style composite item. Registers itself with the nearest composite root and
receives the roving `tabindex` from the root's highlighted index.
Registers the host with the nearest composite list without changing focus behavior.

inputs.name: metadata
inputs.description: Arbitrary metadata included in the list's ordered item map.

parts.description:
Base UI-style composite list. Owns item registration and DOM-order metadata without applying
roving tabindex or keyboard navigation.

outputs.name: onMapChange
outputs.description: Emits when the ordered item map changes.

parts.description: Internal Base UI-style composite root for roving index and arrow-key navigation.

inputs.name: dir
inputs.description: Text direction for horizontal arrow-key navigation.

inputs.name: disabledIndices
inputs.description: Indices that are skipped by keyboard navigation.

inputs.name: highlightItemOnHover
inputs.description: Whether hovering an item should focus it.

inputs.name: loopFocus
inputs.description: Whether arrow-key navigation wraps at the first/last item.

inputs.name: modifierKeys
inputs.description: Modifier keys that should not block composite navigation.

inputs.name: stopEventPropagation
inputs.description: Whether handled navigation keys stop propagation.

outputs.name: onHighlightedIndexChange
outputs.description: Emits when this root changes the highlighted index.

outputs.name: onMapChange
outputs.description: Emits when the ordered item map changes.
